message:
fix: Use vitest threads pool and reduce memory test iterations

- Switch vitest from forks to threads pool for better native binding compat
- Reduce prepared statements test from 1000 to 500 iterations
- Increase timeout from 120s to 180s for slower CI runners

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,8 @@ export default defineConfig({
   test: {
     globals: true,
     testTimeout: 30000,
+    // Use threads pool instead of forks - more compatible with native bindings
+    pool: 'threads',
     include: ['test/**/*.spec.js', 'test/**/*.test.js'],
     exclude: [
       'test/basic.test.js',
